title: Glock 19
description: Simply name your crossbow "Glock 19" to get a glock 19 in minecraft!
body:
- This adds a feature where you can rename a crossbow "Glock 19" to get a glock 19 model
- If your looking for a funny addition this is great
- This only works on 1.21.5+
- You can use the glock 19 model in your own packs, just make sure to put "Glock 19 made by Feintleaf" in a credits.txt file in your pack
